Hi Keepers! This is our biggest update ever and there's bugs here and there. we'll be hotfixing them soon!
Known issues: 
-The new worldbuilding archives contain buggy rich text tags and typos. We'll fix it asap!
-Doresain's main story chapter 3 contained a typo in Chinese where Silver Key 银钥 was misspelt as Silver Core 银芯. We'll update the CN and EN text in a hotfix!
